designs.name: Congo
designs.intro: Named after the lush Congo rainforest in Central Africa, this Clarke & Clarke washable rug captures the spirit of the wild through bold botanical design and rich, moody colour palettes.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Congo Jungle Washable
colourways.desc: Named after the lush Congo rainforest in Central Africa, this Clarke & Clarke washable rug captures the spirit of the wild through bold botanical design and rich, moody colour palettes. With the texture and depth of an oil painting, Congo brings a striking artistic touch to any interior, from modern living rooms and contemporary bedrooms to luxury home offices and statement hallways.

designs.name: Fiore
designs.intro: Bring timeless romance to your home with the Clarke & Clarke Fiore Rug Collection.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Fiore Heather Washable
colourways.desc: Bring timeless romance to your home with the Clarke & Clarke Fiore Rug Collection. A painterly floral design brought to life in rich, layered tones, Fiore embodies the brand’s signature romantic spirit. Each rug captures expressive brushstrokes and subtle colour blending reminiscent of fine art, creating a luxurious yet livable statement for any space. Crafted from soft, durable fibres and fully machine washable, the Fiore rug pairs artistic elegance with modern practicality. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and dining areas, this washable area rug brings warmth, texture, and sophistication to any interior style, from classic to contemporary.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Fiore Rose Teal Washable
colourways.desc: Bring timeless romance to your home with the Clarke & Clarke Fiore Rug Collection. designs.name: Passiflora
designs.intro: Transform your space with the Clarke & Clarke Passiflora Rug Collection, a stunning range of machine washable rugs that combine artistic elegance with everyday practicality.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Passiflora Blush Washable
colourways.desc: Transform your space with the Clarke & Clarke Passiflora Rug Collection, a stunning range of machine washable rugs that combine artistic elegance with everyday practicality. Featuring romantic, painterly floral designs, each rug brings warmth and colour to any interior, from modern living rooms to bedrooms and dining areas. The trailing passionflowers bloom across a rich, full-colour base cloth, giving depth and texture to every brushstroke. A hand-painted effect creates beautiful movement and dimension, while the soft, durable fibres ensure comfort underfoot and lasting quality, even in high-traffic areas. Perfect for busy homes, these washable area rugs are easy to clean and maintain, making them ideal for families, pet owners, and style lovers alike.

designs.name: Tahiti
designs.intro: Inspired by the lush beauty of the islands of Tahiti, this Clarke & Clarke washable rug bursts with large-scale jungle florals and rich, tropical colour.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Tahiti Forest & Rouge Washable
colourways.desc: Inspired by the lush beauty of the islands of Tahiti, this Clarke & Clarke washable rug bursts with large-scale jungle florals and rich, tropical colour. Each motif comes alive against a darker base, creating striking contrast and a captivating sense of depth, the perfect statement piece for modern living rooms, bedrooms, and dining spaces. The Tahiti Rug Collection blends island-inspired artistry with everyday practicality. Crafted from soft, durable fibres and fully machine washable, it’s ideal for busy homes that want to keep their interiors bold, bright, and easy to maintain.

designs.name: Toucan
designs.intro: Bring the vibrancy of the tropics into your home with the Clarke & Clarke Toucan Rug Collection.

colourways.title: Clarke & Clarke Toucan Antique Washable
colourways.desc: Bring the vibrancy of the tropics into your home with the Clarke & Clarke Toucan Rug Collection. Inspired by original Clarke & Clarke mural artwork, this hand-painted design bursts with personality and artistic flair. The lush layered composition captures the richness of tropical landscapes, while visible brush textures give each rug a sense of depth, movement, and authenticity. Made from soft, durable materials and fully machine washable, the Toucan rug combines expressive artistry with everyday practicality. Perfect for adding warmth, colour, and character to modern living rooms, bedrooms, and open-plan spaces.

designs.name: Air
designs.intro: Breathe calm and creativity into your home with the Harlequin Air Rug Collection.

colourways.title: Harlequin Air Golden Light Washable
colourways.desc: Breathe calm and creativity into your home with the Harlequin Air Rug Collection. Inspired by the fluid beauty of air and motion, this design captures the essence of modern artistry through sweeping brushstrokes and softly blended hues. The result is a contemporary abstract rug that feels light, balanced, and effortlessly elegant, perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and open-plan interiors. Crafted from soft yet durable fibres, each machine washable rug offers the perfect combination of luxury and practicality. With its modern palette and soothing design, Air brings a sense of tranquillity and sophistication to any space.

designs.name: Demoiselle
designs.intro: Inspired by the natural elegance of the dragonfly, the Harlequin Demoiselle Rug Collection embodies grace, balance, and quiet beauty.

colourways.title: Harlequin Demoiselle Fern Washable
colourways.desc: Inspired by the natural elegance of the dragonfly, the Harlequin Demoiselle Rug Collection embodies grace, balance, and quiet beauty. This machine washable rug showcases intricately painted dragonflies gliding across a softly textured background, capturing Harlequin’s signature mix of artistry and sophistication. The fluid design and layered tones create a sense of lightness and movement, making Demoiselle a standout piece for modern living rooms, bedrooms, or serene reading spaces. Crafted from soft yet durable fibres, this rug offers luxurious texture with the convenience of easy machine washing, perfect for stylish, practical living.

designs.name: Extravagance
designs.intro: Understated yet luxurious, the Harlequin Extravagance Rug Collection captures elegance in its purest form.

colourways.title: Harlequin Extravagance Champagne Washable
colourways.desc: Understated yet luxurious, the Harlequin Extravagance Rug Collection captures elegance in its purest form. Inspired by natural fern silhouettes, this tonal botanical design brings a sense of calm and sophistication to any interior. The layered, textural effect creates soft movement across the surface, giving the impression of woven light and shadow. Crafted from soft, durable fibres and fully machine washable, Extravagance offers effortless style and practicality in equal measure. Its versatile neutral palette makes it perfect for modern living rooms, serene bedrooms, and contemporary dining spaces, adding quiet depth without overpowering a room’s design.

designs.name: Floreana
designs.intro: Inspired by the tropical beauty of the Galápagos island of Floreana, this Harlequin washable rug captures a sense of organic movement and artistic expression.

colourways.title: Harlequin Floreana Black Earth Washable
colourways.desc: Inspired by the tropical beauty of the Galápagos island of Floreana, this Harlequin washable rug captures a sense of organic movement and artistic expression. Painterly floral and leaf forms sweep across a textured base, creating a balanced mix of subtle colour and gentle flow. The design’s fluid brushwork and layered tones bring warmth, elegance, and a touch of the exotic to modern interiors. Woven from soft yet durable fibres, the Floreana Rug Collection combines luxurious texture with machine-washable practicality, ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, and open-plan spaces that value both style and ease of care.
